data.name: Gooning Simulator
data.detailed_description:
What is Gooning Simulator?

A femdom focused clicker/incremental game with dating sim narrative elements. When your online Mistress takes away your ability to cum, you’ll have to make enough money gooning to pay for an in person session with her, or else you’ll explode from too much cum!

In a world where pre-cum is currency, maximize your goon cave, and earn nudes, sexts, hot voice messages, and more on your way to receiving the best orgasm of your life!

Features

  • The Final Release will include +50 hand-drawn porn CGs spanning many different kinks, fetishes, and porn scenarios.

  • More than +150 upgrades to maximize your goon cave and pre output.

  •  A gender-neutral player character.

  •  Multiple mini games.

  • Hundreds of lines of sexts with your hot, goth, dommy Mistress.

  • A 4 Act story with +5,000 words of dialogue, completely VA'd by a professional phone sex operator, the lead dev herself, Holesome Pervert.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 instructions, x86_64 CPU, ARMv8 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Relatively modern dedicated graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Any PC or laptop built in the last 5 years should have little to no issues running the game.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13
  • 處理器: x86_64 or ARM CPU (Apple Silicon)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Relatively modern dedicated graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Any Mac built in the last 5 years should have little to no issues running the game.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux distribution released after 2016
  • 處理器: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 instructions, x86_64 CPU, ARMv7 or ARMv8 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Relatively modern dedicated graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Any PC or laptop built in the last 5 years should have little to no issues running the game.
